allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:5000/health -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "SERVER $\($r.StatusCode\): $\($r.Content\)" } catch { "SERVER ERR: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:3000 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "CLIENT $\($r2.StatusCode\): $\($r2.Content.Length\) bytes" } catch { "CLIENT ERR: $_" })
